'''fakada''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ngulu|ngulu]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-k-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ngulu|ngulu]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| fakada
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fækædæth|fækædæth]] || [[word:fækædæj|fækædæj]] || [[word:fækædæsh|fækædæsh]] || [[word:fækædæ|fækædæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fakakadath|fakakadath]] || [[word:fakakadaj|fakakadaj]] || [[word:fakakadash|fakakadash]] || [[word:fakakada|fakakada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fakadath|fakadath]] || [[word:fakadaj|fakadaj]] || [[word:fakadash|fakadash]] || [[word:fakada|fakada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fakafdath|fakafdath]] || [[word:fakafdaj|fakafdaj]] || [[word:fakafdash|fakafdash]] || [[word:fakafdaf|fakafdaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fakadatha|fakadatha]] || [[word:fakadaja|fakadaja]] || [[word:fakadasha|fakadasha]] || [[word:fakadaka|fakadaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fakadath|fakadath]] || [[word:fakadaj|fakadaj]] || [[word:fakadash|fakadash]] || [[word:fakada|fakada]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fakadathal|fakadathal]] || [[word:fakadajal|fakadajal]] || [[word:fakadashal|fakadashal]] || [[word:fakadakal|fakadakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fakadathatha|fakadathatha]] || [[word:fakadajaja|fakadajaja]] || [[word:fakadashasha|fakadashasha]] || [[word:fakadaka|fakadaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fakadathan|fakadathan]] || [[word:fakadajan|fakadajan]] || [[word:fakadashan|fakadashan]] || [[word:fakadakan|fakadakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fakadathaoro|fakadathaoro]] || [[word:fakadajaoro|fakadajaoro]] || [[word:fakadashaoro|fakadashaoro]] || [[word:fakadakaoro|fakadakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
